name: python3-libvhdi
title: python3-libvhdi
summary: Virtual Hard Disk image format access library -- Python 3 bindings
description:
Virtual Hard Disk image format access library -- Python 3 bindings
libvhdi is a library to access the Virtual Hard Disk (VHD) image format.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libvhdi.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-libvhdi because Virtual Hard Disk image format access library -- Python 3 bindings.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-libvhdi as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-libvhdi with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-libvhdi --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
